title: Chat History Plus
description: A small and simple mod that allows for configurable chat history size.
body: # Chat History Plus A small and simple mod that allows for configurate chat history size. Please note that this is my first mod! I will keep this mod updated as much as I can :) ## Features - Configurable chat history size (from 10 to 100k) - Can be disabled outright if needed ## Modpack If you wish to use this mod in a modpack, I ask that you host the modpack on Modrinth. Any other questions? Feel free to reach out via Github Issues or email (imide@imide.xyz) ## Credits Credits can be found at the [README.md.](https://github.com/imide/ChatHistoryPlus)
